ksa_text: Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact assessments (DPIAs) for new data processing activities and AI systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-S-001 (Security and Privacy/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.480, highest: EU AI Act at 0.480). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. ISO 8000 technical data operations: data entry, validation, verification, quality task execution, and data accuracy maintenance at technician/entry level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.480, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.480)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: KSA SP-S-001 (Security and Privacy/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.480, highest: EU AI Act at 0.480). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0.
